text_block_list.text:
The day has finally arrived. It's time<n>for the
mysterious ball that Fuji Kiseki<n>invited me to!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It's about time. You've got<n>some nerve
making me wait.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone's here now! I can't<n>wait any
longer, so let's get going<n>already! Vamos!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The art gallery's multipurpose hall is<n>serving as
the venue. Are you ready?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! We'll settle that dance battle from<n>the other
day once and for all! Right<n>here, right now!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I was hoping you'd say that!

The two dancers lock eyes and smile.<n>I can feel
their intense passion from<n>here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa and King Halo
text_block_list.text: To the ball!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The blinding spotlights, the crowd ofguests... Ah yes, now this is aball!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But... don'tcha think this is kinda<n>different from
what you imagined?

text_block_list.name: Cheerleader Girl
text_block_list.text:
Does everybody have their<n>pom-poms ready?!
Let's see those<n>dance moves!

text_block_list.name: Older Man in Happi
text_block_list.text:
Ho-ho-ho! Soiya-sassa! Mmhmm! My<n>joints are
feeling good!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Cheerleaders and traditional happi<n>coats?! Is
there no dress code at all?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, my darling ponies. Thank<n>you for
coming.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Fuji! Um, what is with this...unique ball?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's a gathering of local dance groups<n>that love
dance more than anything.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
They all love to dance? All right! I love<n>anything
that's fun!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, El. Are you serious? You<n>can't talk like
that to people you've<n>only just met!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's quite all right. Everyone<n>here loves to
dance, so we're all<n>kindred spirits.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Cha-cha-cha! ♪ Cha-cha-cha! ♪ I love<n>it! You're
all so talented!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I do believe inviting you all<n>was the right
decision.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is an event that transcends<n>genre and
generations, so I've invited<n>people from all
walks of life to come<n>and have fun.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The concept is simple—everyone<n>come together
and dance! And please<n>do try to enjoy
yourselves!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A gathering for everyone... So that's<n>what Fuji
meant...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Then leave it to my first-rate self to<n>show
everyone the perfect dance to<n>really get this
party started!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's the way! I do know how<n>hard you've
worked in preparation for<n>today.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Would you care to share a dance with<n>me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'd love to!

King Halo and Fuji Kiseki perform a<n>captivating
dance that draws the<n>attention of everyone at the
venue.

text_block_list.name: Cheerleader Girl
text_block_list.text:
It's so beautiful! Their tails twirl<n>whenever they
spin!

text_block_list.name: Older Man in Happi
text_block_list.text:
Wow, how elegant! It almost feels like<n>we're in
the guest hall of a castle.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Everyone was captivated by<n>your dance.
Many thanks for bringing<n>joy to the guests.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But of course! I am the belle of the<n>ballroom. The
shining star of the dance<n>floor!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...You resembled nothing less than an<n>angel who
had descended from<n>heaven.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ngh?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: W-well, I am first-rate! Perhaps Ijust can't help being seen that way!Ohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh. So, everyone! Keep watching as<n>I continue
to dance for you all!

King Halo has a dizzyingly fun time<n>surrounded
by a crowd of dancers.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thank you very much! I had<n>so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As did I. Thank you for such a<n>wonderful time,
my dear pony.

text_block_list.name: Older Person in Formal Wear A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, young lady in the<n>emerald dress? Do
you have a<n>moment?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But of course. How may I help you?

text_block_list.name: Older Person in Formal Wear A
text_block_list.text:
We, the members of the Ballroom<n>Dance Society,
would be very honored<n>if we could share a
dance with you.

text_block_list.name: Older Person in Formal Wear B
text_block_list.text: Indeed we would. Myself especially.

text_block_list.name: Older Person in Formal Wear C
text_block_list.text: Mumble mumble... shuffleshuffle...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: W-wait, with all these people?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...No, what am I saying? If they all<n>wish to dance
with me, the only<n>first-rate solution is to dance
with<n>everyone!

After doing just that, King Halo looks<n>exhausted,
but very proud of herself.
